        Implies(And(possible(5), 7 | 5 == 5), possible(7)),
        Implies(And(possible(6), 7 | 6 == 6), possible(7)),
        Implies(And(possible(7), 7 | 7 == 7), possible(7))))

1. And(And(And(Implies(And(verify(0, A), verify(0, B)),

                    verify(0 | 1, B)),

CONCLUSIONS CONSTRAINTS:
1. Or(Or(And(Or(verify(0, A),
             Or(Or(And(verify(0, A),
                       verify(0, B),
                       0 == 0 | 0),
                   And(verify(0, A),
                       verify(1, B),
                       0 == 0 | 1),
                   And(verify(0, A),
                       verify(2, B),
                       0 == 0 | 2),
                   And(verify(0, A),
                       verify(3, B),
                       0 == 0 | 3),
                   And(verify(0, A),
                       verify(4, B),
                       0 == 0 | 4),
                   And(verify(0, A),
                       verify(5, B),
                       0 == 0 | 5),
                   And(verify(0, A),
                       verify(6, B),
                       0 == 0 | 6),
                   And(verify(0, A),
                       verify(7, B),
                       0 == 0 | 7),
                   And(verify(0, A),
                       verify(8, B),
                       0 == 0 | 8),
                   And(verify(0, A),
                       verify(9, B),
                       0 == 0 | 9),
                   And(verify(0, A),
                       verify(10, B),
                       0 == 0 | 10),
                   And(verify(0, A),
                       verify(11, B),
                       0 == 0 | 11),
                   And(verify(0, A),
                       verify(12, B),
                       0 == 0 | 12),
                   And(verify(0, A),
                       verify(13, B),
                       0 == 0 | 13),
                   And(verify(0, A),
                       verify(14, B),
                       0 == 0 | 14),
                   And(verify(0, A),
                       verify(15, B),
                       0 == 0 | 15)),
                Or(And(verify(1, A),
                       verify(0, B),
                       0 == 1 | 0),
                   And(verify(1, A),
                       verify(1, B),
                       0 == 1 | 1),
                   And(verify(1, A),
                       verify(2, B),
                       0 == 1 | 2),
                   And(verify(1, A),
                       verify(3, B),
                       0 == 1 | 3),
                   And(verify(1, A),
                       verify(4, B),

EXAMPLE CF_TH_14: there is no countermodel.
